title: Past-Only Stint-Shape Cliff Features
summary: Recent F1 degradation work models latent tyre state, and recent pit-stop deep-learning work highlights local motifs such as sharp lap-time changes.
rationale: Recent F1 degradation work models latent tyre state, and recent pit-stop deep-learning work highlights local motifs such as sharp lap-time changes. Your best solutions are mostly level-based; they appear to underuse the shape of the last few laps within a stint.
implementation_hint: Within each Driver x Race x Stint, create past-only rolling features: 2-5 lap slope and curvature of `LapTime_Delta`, EWMA acceleration, recent max positive jump, `Cumulative_Degradation` slope, first-lap-on-tyre settling signature, and deviation from race-lap median pace after masking pit in/out laps.
expected_effect: Earlier detection of the tyre "cliff" before coarse tyre-life or degradation totals become extreme.
risk: Including pit in-laps, out-laps, or improperly sorted rows will inject noise or leakage; sequence order must be exact.
